creator: vishwin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to wen from comment #24)
First two points are exactly what I was thinking. Third point, I think we should gradually deprecate ${PYNUMPY} in favour of the directly specifying the dependency line, but for now keep ${PYNUMPY} to point to math/py-numpy1. Those ports that are already safe for numpy 2.x can already switch to the direct dependency line.
